name: Java Game Design
postCreateCommand: sudo rm -f /etc/apt/sources.list.d/yarn.list && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y fluxbox novnc x11vnc xvfb && chmod +x scripts/run.sh
postStartCommand: Xvfb :1 -screen 0 1024x768x24 & sleep 2 && fluxbox & sleep 1 && fluxbox-remote "SetResourceValue session.screen0.toolbar.visible false" && x11vnc -display :1 -nopw -forever -shared & /usr/share/novnc/utils/launch.sh --vnc localhost:5900 --listen 6080
